result.formatted_address: 2446 S Pulaski Rd, Chicago, IL 60623, USA

recent_reviews.text: My kids have been here four years now, the communication and care is great. The layout of the school is comforting since the wall dividers between classrooms are about 5ft you can always hear and see the children. The teachers are very attentive and whole heartedly care for the kids as their own. When hiring new teachers they have a lengthy process to be hired but also their behaviors with the children are monitored because there is never just one teacher alone with kids and their are cameras throughout the center. I will always recommend this childcare and continue with their services. They work with the children to reach their milestones and even help to potty train. They abide by any allergies and medication administrations. They're great with breastmilk procedures and always stay busy with the kids instead of having them in front of a TV.

I am VERY disappointed with this daycare. They are very money greedy. I had my toddler enrolled for 4 months and always paid the private rate always on time, but then I went on maternity leave from my job and I asked them to save my spot for her and my new baby. I called every month to make sure they still had my spot and every time they said they still had their spot. ONE day before I went back to work they decided to cancel on me. I know it is because they get more money from  kids who get government aid. So if you are a private payer please avoid this daycare. They will literally screw you over!
I been havin both of my kids here!! Great teachers and staff

recent_reviews.text: This would be the center I would enroll my grand children in, unfortunately they are pasted daycare stage. Wonderful family environment with a living and caring staff

recent_reviews.text: A Zmall World is a wonderful center that truly cares for the families they service. They are very professional and provide a safe environment for their children. If you are looking for a Daycare that will focus on teaching your children then look no further! You will love it here.

I HIGHLY recommend this facility for your little ones. My son loves coming here and he loves his teachers , the staff members are amazing they’re always so welcoming and supportive. My son has learned so many new things since being here, having your child here will definitely bring you peace of mind.

Highly recommend this child care center !! All the teachers are super nice with a lot of patience. They helped my son expand his vocabulary in a short period of time since he was having a hard time speaking. I NEVER  had a problem with the teachers or kids being mean to my son in the 2 years that he's been there. Very respectful environment for sure !  😌🤗👍

recent_reviews.text: Les Finch Learning School is one of those rare places where you can actually feel the love the moment you walk through the door. The staff genuinely cares about each child’s growth, not just academically but as a whole person. They pay attention, they nurture, they guide — and they do it with real heart. It’s the kind of environment that feels less like a school and more like a second home, a place where kids feel safe, supported, and encouraged to become the best version of themselves.
This by far is thee best daycare. My son has been here for a year now and I can say that’s he’s learned so much. The teachers are dedicated to he kids and I appreciate it so much.

We love our family. This business and staff loves what they do and were sent by God to serve, take care of and teach the children the things as if all of them were their own, And has been doing so for decades. If you want to see a true definition of love then stop by and check them out.
Anthony J.

recent_reviews.text: It was a safe haven in my youth for the community people and those abroad . The agency offered a plethora of services and activities that kept teens and youth engaged. Therefore helping us to become well rounded people.
I recall having breakfast with the CHICAGO BEARS every year and performances with the AJABU theatre. Those were the best days of my life. I am now 59 years old.
BBF has been a real gem for the neighborhood for many years. It has evolved  from being Archie Moore Gym to BBF Family Services from 60's when I went there as a kid. Keep up the great work!

result.place_name: El Valor Carlos Cantu Children & Family Center

recent_reviews.text: Teachers with no empathy for children! Terrible service for children. They bother you for anything. They don't allow the child in if they want to talk to you. They hold complaint meetings almost twice a week when dropping off the child. They banned my child for a week because he was starting a medication and they wanted a lot of things that were totally unnecessary, just to keep him from entering, putting up obstacles for everything. I do not recommend this school for childcare if you have a job, as they would be wasting your time.

I absolutely love the center. My son loves it as well. The teachers are great, very patient and understanding! They are supportive and have assisted my son and I with so many things and resources. Highly recommended

My daughter attended El Valor and I am very happy that she did she learned so much from the time she was there. The teachers and the whole staff are just great they are very committed to the kids I was very pleased!

Great facility, fabulous teachers & administration
Love this place.
